description: Legal document dated June 1802 CE (3 Sivan 5562 AM) involving a partnership in Alexandria between Hayyim ha-Levi, Merkado Karo, Avraham ha-Levi, and Pinhas b. Yom Tov Aripol/Arifol (אריפול). Location: the document was issued in Cairo (מצרים). The original document may have include a signatures section that has been lost to damage.
tags: Alexandria, Karo y Frances, Late Heb, Partnership, Merkado Karo, 19th c, Avraham ha-Levi
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
